positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed linework illustration of a celestial forest. The design features interconnected bioluminescent flora, floating crystalline moons, and abstract constellations formed by glowing rivers of stardust. Use a strong, contrasting color palette of deep indigo, luminous teal, and metallic gold accents. The composition must be perfectly centered, featuring clean, solid silhouettes and intricate mandalic patterns suitable for a high-contrast textile print. Style: Geometric, stylized vector art, clean linework, depth, symmetry, perfect for screen printing.
